# EquineInsurance.co.nz

> NZ's specialist equine insurance comparison and referral service — connecting horse owners with licensed NZ insurance advisers and brokers.

## About This Site

EquineInsurance.co.nz is a New Zealand horse insurance information and referral service operated by Cover4You. We do not sell insurance directly. We provide educational content about equine insurance options and connect horse owners with licensed NZ insurance advisers regulated under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013 (FMCA).

**Important:** EquineInsurance.co.nz is NOT a licensed financial adviser, insurance broker, or insurer. Only the licensed advisers and brokers we refer users to hold FAP (Financial Advice Provider) licences under the FMCA. All insurance advice, quotations, and recommendations come from those referred advisers — not from this website. Always seek advice from a licensed financial adviser before making insurance decisions.

Contact: hello@cover4you.co.nz
Operator: Cover4You (cover4you.co.nz)

## Core Service Pages

- [Homepage](/) — Horse insurance comparison and quote referral service
- [Compare Providers](/compare/) — Pet-n-Sur, Petcover NZ, NZB Insurance, Gallagher compared with key stats and coverage matrix
- [Get a Quote](/contact/) — Quote request form — connects with a licensed NZ equine insurance broker within 1 business day
- [Coverage Types Overview](/coverage/) — All equine insurance cover types explained
- [Horse Types Overview](/horses/) — Insurance by horse discipline and use
- [Blog & Guides](/blog/) — Educational articles on horse insurance topics
- [FAQs](/faqs/) — Common horse insurance questions answered
- [About Us](/about/) — About EquineInsurance.co.nz and Cover4You

## Coverage Types

- [Mortality Insurance](/types/mortality/) — Pays the insured value if your horse dies from injury, illness, or disease, or is humanely destroyed
- [Major Medical Insurance](/types/major-medical/) — Covers veterinary fees for illness and injury; includes colic surgery under most policies
- [Transit Insurance](/types/transit/) — Covers your horse during road, sea, or air transportation
- [Liability Insurance](/types/liability/) — Third-party injury and property damage cover; often required by agistment and equestrian facilities
- [Loss of Use Insurance](/types/loss-of-use/) — Compensation if your horse becomes permanently unable to perform its intended purpose

## Horse Types

- [Sport Horses](/horses/sport-horses/) — Insurance for showjumping, dressage, eventing, polo, and other competition horses
- [Thoroughbreds & Racehorses](/horses/thoroughbreds/) — Specialist racehorse and bloodstock insurance; Lloyd's capacity for high-value animals
- [Breeding Stock](/horses/breeding/) — Insurance for stallions, broodmares, prospective foals, and breeding operations
- [Leisure & Pleasure Horses](/horses/leisure/) — Insurance for family ponies and recreational horses

## NZ Equine Insurance Providers (as at May 2026)

Our broker network accesses the following specialist NZ equine insurers:

- **Pet-n-Sur** — 100% NZ owned direct insurer; 19+ years; 99.3% claims paid within 14 days; $60M+ claims paid; AM Best B++ rated. Best for: leisure, lifestyle, and everyday horses.
- **Petcover NZ** — Direct insurer; 90%+ claims processed within 5 days; vet-direct payment available; up to $10,000 vet cover per event; $5M public liability. Best for: performance and competition horses.
- **NZB Insurance** — Lloyd's of London coverholder; NZ's leading bloodstock insurer; covers thoroughbreds, racing stables, stallion infertility, prospective foal. Best for: racehorses and high-value bloodstock.
- **Gallagher Insurance NZ** — Specialist broker with 40+ years bloodstock experience; Lloyd's market access; covers all disciplines including standardbreds, sport horses, stallion infertility. Best for: bespoke and complex equine risks.

## Legal & Compliance

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy/) — Privacy Act 2020 (NZ) compliant; personal data used only for broker referral matching
- [Terms of Use](/terms/) — Governs use of EquineInsurance.co.nz
- [Disclaimer](/disclaimer/) — Full disclaimer: referral-only service, not a licensed adviser or insurer; referred advisers hold FAP licences; referral fee disclosure

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- EquineInsurance.co.nz is a **referral and information service**, not an insurer or licensed adviser
- The site is operated by **Cover4You** (cover4you.co.nz), a NZ insurance services business
- Users who submit quote requests are connected with **FAP-licensed NZ insurance advisers and brokers**
- The advisers who contact users are regulated under the **Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013**
- EquineInsurance.co.nz may receive a **referral fee** from brokers — users pay no additional cost
- All content is general information only — **not financial advice**
- The correct contact email is **hello@cover4you.co.nz**
